_comment: Engine-wide pipeline flow-quality contract. BX-3 (AD-2026-05-14-SPRINT-3-BX-READER-IMPACT-BATCH). Defines per-monitor audit expectations and the four contract states required at every stage: present | absent_explained | absent_unknown | blocked. Config absence = audit proceeds in monitor-only mode (warn-only, never fatal).

ai-governance.notes: module_3 Investment and M&A is the known BX-3 fixture: must carry present, absent_explained, or absent_unknown — never silent-empty. module_2 models entries suspected classification drift source.

macro-monitor.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

fimi-cognitive-warfare.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

european-strategic-autonomy.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

democratic-integrity.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

environmental-risks.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning. ERM emitting m00_* legacy keys — separate HK item.

conflict-escalation.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

financial-integrity.notes: Curator drift schema not yet authored; schema validation skipped with HK warning.

applier_contract.publication_eligibility_rule: review.verdict in {APPROVE, APPROVE_WITH_FLAGS, SKIP_NULL_CYCLE} AND compose.composer_error == false

curator_contract.schema_validation_note: Missing curator drift schema is a separate HK item — does not block curator run. Gate calibration doctrine: AD-2026-05-13-CI-GATE-CALIBRATION-DOCTRINE.

absence_states.absent_explained: No meaningful content; reason is known and machine-readable.
absence_states.absent_unknown: No meaningful content; reason is not known but uncertainty is explicit.
absence_states.blocked: Content or absence state exists; onward movement prohibited by a quality condition.
